description: Actions that perform geospatial reasoning operations on datasets.

functions.name: FILTER
functions.description: Select a subset of the dataset features.

filter.description: A georeference or literal in WKT format (ex. bbox) used to filter the dataset.

functions.name: SUMMARIZE
functions.description: Describe a dataset including summary statistics and information about each column.

functions.name: CORRELATE
functions.description: Compute a new dataset by correlating features from two datasets.

dataset1.description: A georeference for the first dataset.

dataset2.description: A georeference for the second dataset.

distance.description: A distance in meters around the first dataset.

correlation_type.description: The type of correlation to compute, which should be one of: intersection or difference
